jcr:content.jcr:description: At AbbVie, our innovation grows when we put patients first. Learn about our R&D capabilities and expertise, from precision medicine to patient-focused drug development.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Areas of Innovation
jcr:content.description: At AbbVie, our innovation grows when we put patients first.
jcr:content.title: Innovation That Raises the Bar

title.jcr:title: Innovation is more than invention – it's the relentless pursuit of better for patients

text.text: At AbbVie, we make smart bets, learn fast and move even faster, finding untapped opportunities to expand the reach of medicine far beyond expectations.

video_copy_copy_copy.description: We’re harnessing technology to deliver better medicines to patients faster.
video_copy_copy_copy.descriptiveIframeTitle: Discovery Files: The Eureka Moment Behind a Scientific Discovery
video_copy_copy_copy.title: Accelerating drug development with AI

title_copy.jcr:title: Explore the science shaping the future of medicine

text_copy.text: We’re transforming R&D with artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML) and an industry-leading data platform to help speed up the pace of discovery.

text_copy_copy_copy.text: With access to more than 1 million genomes, we’re leading one of the world’s largest genomics research efforts to better understand the drivers of disease.

button_copy.jcr:title: learn more
button_copy.accessibilityLabel: learn more about genetics and genomics

text_copy_copy.text: From partnering with patients to leveraging digital health technologies, our scientists use novel approaches that apply patient insights and harness real data.

button_copy.jcr:title: learn more
button_copy.accessibilityLabel: learn more about Patient-focused drug development

text_copy_copy.text: Harnessing advanced technologies and a deep understanding of disease mechanisms to develop the right medicine for the right patient, faster.
Our versatile R&D toolbox includes cutting-edge modalities and platform technologies to create the best molecule for each target.

text_copy_copy_copy.text: Fueling early-stage opportunities in oncology, immunology, neuroscience, eye care, and aesthetics through AbbVie’s strategic venture capital arm.
Harnessing advanced technologies and a deep understanding of disease mechanisms to develop the right medicine for the right patient, faster.
Our versatile R&D toolbox includes cutting-edge modalities and platform technologies to create the best molecule for each target.

text_copy_copy_copy_.text: Fueling early-stage opportunities in oncology, immunology, neuroscience, eye care and aesthetics through AbbVie’s strategic venture capital arm.

button_copy_copy.jcr:title: learn more
button_copy_copy.accessibilityLabel: learn more about Patient-focused drug development

text_copy_copy.text: Harnessing advanced technologies and a deep understanding of disease mechanisms to develop the right medicine for the right patient, faster.
Our versatile R&D toolbox includes cutting-edge modalities and platform technologies to create the best molecule for each target.

text_copy_copy_copy.text: Fueling early-stage opportunities in oncology, immunology, neuroscience, eye care, and aesthetics through AbbVie’s strategic venture capital arm.

text.text: Behind every breakthrough is a technology pushing science further. From harnessing artificial intelligence in drug discovery, to advancing genetic medicine, our teams leverage powerful tools that can accelerate progress, working to transform ideas into medicines that can change lives.

teaser_copy_copy_cop.jcr:description: Watch as leading researchers explain cutting-edge science in fast, focused one-minute videos.
teaser_copy_copy_cop.jcr:title:
Science in 
60 seconds

video_copy_copy_copy.transcript:
ADCs in 60 Seconds

What are antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs)? Watch scientist Emily Faivre explain how ADCs work in this One Minute Thesis.

Multispecific Antibodies in 60 Seconds

Discover how multispecific antibodies are being used to discover new potential treatment options.

Shuttle Technology in 60 Seconds

Hear Alessandra Welker, PhD, explain how shuttle technology can help unlock new possibilities for treating neurological disorders and deliver medicines through the blood-brain barrier.

text_copy_copy.text: We’re using advanced technologies to help accelerate medicines and leveraging deep understanding of disease mechanisms to target the right patient with the right medicine at the right time.

Through investments in breakthrough platform technologies, artificial intelligence (AI)/machine learning (ML) applications and drug delivery advances, we continue to grow our R&D toolbox — a mix of traditional and cutting-edge therapeutic modalities — to create the best compound for a specific target.

text_copy_copy_copy.text: Through investments in breakthrough platform technologies, artificial intelligence (AI)/machine learning (ML) applications and drug delivery advances, we continue to grow our R&D toolbox — a mix of traditional and cutting-edge therapeutic modalities — to create the best compound for a specific target.

title_copy.jcr:title: Help redefine what’s possible in medicine

text_copy_copy_copy.text: Bring your expertise to a team where bold ideas and new technologies become real-world solutions for patients.
